title: School Election 2023, National Study
description: "School Election 2023, National Study" is a national survey conducted by Sentio Research on behalf of Sikt - Norwegian Agency for Shared Services in Education and Research. The questions included in the survey are some of the same questions that were posed to pupils in Norwegian high schools in the School Election Study in 2023. The survey was conducted as telephone interviews in the period 30 August - 10 September 2023.
